overview: This scene captures a tense moment between a domestic orange and white cat inside and a wild bobcat looking in through the window. Bobcats are native predators frequently spotted in residential areas like Tucson, Arizona. They are skilled hunters, and it is advised to keep domestic pets safely indoors and never leave them unattended outside.
